problem id: 78616706
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR NOT SHL(7)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  01101001 -> 00001101
  01111111 -> 10001111
  10000001 -> 00010000
  00111111 -> 10000111
  10011100 -> 00010011
  11011100 -> 00011011
  10001110 -> 00010001
  01110100 -> 00001110

query: 00111001
predicted answer: 00000111
